description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test '$PYTHONPATH' installation that runs on every push to dev and main branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test Python 3.11 with various pytest flags. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs ISOFIT and dependencies, caches 6S, sRTMnet, and Hypertrace data, downloads and builds 6S if cache misses, installs sRTMnet if cache misses, downloads and unpacks Hypertrace data if cache misses, and executes tests with custom PYTHONPATH.
